title: LobeHub推CAO解决AI工具协调负担
full_text:
Chubby♨️ on X: "Having access to different AI tools isn't the bottleneck anymore, it is the cognitive load of orchestrating them. LobeHub is tackling this systemic challenge with a new operational paradigm called the Chief Agent Operator (CAO).
Instead of requiring users to micromanage https://t.co/Td1EHwWKax" / X
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Chubby♨️
@kimmonismus
Having access to different AI tools isn't the bottleneck anymore, it is the cognitive load of orchestrating them. LobeHub is tackling this systemic challenge with a new operational paradigm called the Chief Agent Operator (CAO).
Instead of requiring users to micromanage AO serves as an autonomous management layer handling cross-tool orchestration behind the scenes.
00:00
